descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average dimension of crystalline grains in material
descriptors.rationale: Controls strength, ductility via Hall-Petch relationship

quality.loss_reason: Full distribution compressed to single mean value
quality.notes: Loses distribution shape, variance, spatial heterogeneity

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: Angular orientation difference across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: Determines boundary energy, mobility, deformation behavior

representation.notes: Mean, variance, skewness or binned distribution

quality.notes: Binning loses fine detail, moments miss multimodality

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: Ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: Indicates grain elongation from processing history

quality.loss_reason: Per-grain ratios averaged to single value
quality.notes: Loses distribution, orientation directions of elongation

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: Degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: Controls anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.notes: J-index scalar or spherical harmonic coefficients

quality.loss_reason: Infinite ODF compressed to finite coefficient set
quality.notes: Coefficient truncation order determines reconstruction fidelity

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Affects diffusion pathways, creep, corrosion resistance

quality.loss_reason: Loses boundary character, topology, spatial distribution
quality.notes: Scalar obscures CSL boundaries, connectivity variations

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total dislocation line length per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Governs work hardening, strength, recovery kinetics

representation.notes: Often measured via XRD peak broadening

quality.loss_reason: Loses dislocation type, arrangement, spatial distribution
quality.notes: Cannot distinguish cell structures versus uniform distribution

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.rationale: Influences recovery, recrystallization, intermediate strength scale

quality.loss_reason: Distributions reduced to three summary statistics
quality.notes: Loses spatial arrangement, distribution shapes, hierarchy
